title: Pan-Seared Dutch Dumplings with Velvety Skewers
description: A twist on traditional dumplings, pan-seared to perfection and served with tender, velvety skewers. This dish is perfect for a cozy evening or a special occasion.
instructions: Preheat a non-stick skillet over medium heat.
Prepare the dumpling mix according to package instructions.
Roll out the dough to a thickness of about 1/4 inch.
Cut out circles of dough using a cookie cutter or the rim of a glass.
Place a tablespoon of velvety mushrooms in the center of each circle.
Fold the dough over to form a half-moon shape, pressing the edges to seal.
Heat the vegetable oil in the skillet over medium heat.
Add the dumplings to the skillet, cooking for about 2-3 minutes on each side.
Serve the pan-seared dumplings hot with the velvety skewers on the side.
